calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Yosef Peretz, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Huitze Moreno, Tzetzangari Morena, Sr., Tzetzangari Moreno, Jr. and Karla Moreno, none of whom were present at today's hearing.
Joseph K. Bravo, Esq. appeared with defendants Norma Rivera and Daniel Rivera, who were placed under oath and examined.
Mr. Bravo appeared for defendants Adan Rivera, Gabrial Rivera and Julia Fuentes, who were not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Continued Trial date was entered on November 10, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Bravo. In consideration for the payment of eight thousand ($8,000.00) dollars from defendants Adan Rivera, Norma Rivera, Gabriel Rivera, Daniel Rivera and Julia Fuentes, plaintiff Huitze Moreno and Tzetzangari Morenao, Sr. agree to dismiss this matter with prejudice. Eight thousand ($8,000.00) dollar payment was tendered in open Court by Mr. Bravo to plaintiffs' counsel Yosef Peretz.

Plaintiff Tzetzangair Moreno, Sr. has twenty-four (24) hours from 10:30 a.m. on November 30, 2009 to sign off on this agreement, or he shall be dismissed from this action, with prejudice. All other plaintiffs are hereby dismissed.

Defendants Norma Rivera and Danile Rivera were voir dired by the Court as to the terms and their understanding of the agreement.

Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From The Defts And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Huitze Moreno, Tezetzangari Moreno and Karla Moreno's motion to compel further responses and responses to form and special interrogatories, requests for admissions, and request for production of documents is granted in part. The motion is granted with the exception to request for production of documents , 10, and 14. Defendant is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses without objections other than based on the attorney client or attorney work product privilege and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $850 within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Amended Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Compel Arbitration & Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Garcia, 648-3060, appearing for defendants and moving parties
Yousef Peretz of Kletter & Peretz, 732-3777, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS ADAN RIVERA and NORMA RIVERA'S Amended Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Compel Arbitration & Stay Proceedings. Motion is granted to stay the litigation, and Norma Rivera and plaintiffs Huitze Moreno and Tzetzangari Gallardo, also known as Tzetzangari Morano are ordered to arbitrate the amount of relocation expenses to be paid by Norma Rivera to H. Moreno and T. Gallardo. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/xSN) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
